title: Anthropic's Labs Lead On Fable's Capabilities + Building AI-Native Products — With Mike Krieger
summary: Fable is a frontier AI model developed by Anthropic's Labs division, led by Mike Krieger. The model was pulled from the market following government action during the period discussed in this podcast interview.
writeup: In this interview, Alex Kantrowitz speaks with Mike Krieger, who leads Anthropic's Labs division, about Fable, a frontier AI model from that team, and about building AI-native products. The conversation covers Fable's capabilities and how frontier models and AI agents shape product design. The summary notes that Fable was pulled from the market following government action during the period discussed.
